$comment: Agentic Harness runtime policy. balanced reuses the same role when the host confirms resume; fresh rotates Generator and Evaluator at Sprint boundaries. Model and effort identifiers are never guessed or translated between providers. Unconfirmed or unavailable values fall back to parent-session inheritance with a warning.

policy.precedence: personal explicit leaf > shared explicit leaf > plugin default
policy.modelIdentifiers: Use an exact provider-supported ID or alias from the official references. Only surrounding whitespace is normalized; ambiguous names are never converted.
policy.capabilities: The orchestrator supplies a JSON file based on observed host controls. A value list alone does not prove that a role-level application path exists.
